description: REAL FAILURE (scrubbed) — a day-of reminder with a RELATIVE date ('today'). The old prompt required a hard YYYY-MM-DD and was never told today's date, so it produced no show. `today` pins the prompt date so the reminder resolves; buildParseSystem() supplies the same in production.

email.subject: 7:00 PM today: HeadRoom by Synchronized Swimming
email.body:
See you tonight!

HeadRoom by Synchronized Swimming
